stories.title: Ex-Designer Warns F1 Energy Rules Risk "Potentially Fatal" Crash

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
An ex-F1 designer is warning the 2026 energy rules risk a "potentially fatal" crash.

After Bearman's 50G impact at Suzuka, the phrase "super clipping" is now on every engineer's lips. The FIA has April meetings scheduled — but is that fast enough?

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #Formula1

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
"Super clipping" = your car suddenly loses power to recharge the battery.

At 300+ km/h, a 45 km/h closing speed gap gets someone killed. That's what hit Bearman at Suzuka.

The FIA needs to act before Miami. #F1Fanrecap #F1 #Formula1

article.headline: Ex-Designer Warns 2026 F1 Energy Rules Risk 'Potentially Fatal' Crash as FIA Schedules April Review

stories.title: Verstappen Drops Clearest Warning Yet About Potential 2026 F1 Exit

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Max Verstappen is dropping hints he could LEAVE F1 at the end of 2026.

Three straight races outside the top 5. 9th in the championship. 12 points.

The four-time world champion has run out of patience. 🔥

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #Verstappen

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Think about this: Verstappen is 9th in the F1 championship with 12 points.

Rookie Isack Hadjar — his own teammate — has out-qualified him twice. The RB22 is a disaster.

He's not wrong to be frustrated. #F1Fanrecap #F1 #RedBull

article.headline: Verstappen Issues Clearest F1 Exit Warning Yet as Red Bull Crisis Deepens

stories.title: Revealed — How F1 Can Fix the Broken 2026 Power Units

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
The 2026 F1 power unit crisis CAN be fixed — but it requires the FIA to act fast.

Options on the table: banning harvesting mode in certain zones, adjusting energy deployment thresholds.

Can they get it done before Miami? #F1Fanrecap #F1 #Formula1

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
The core 2026 F1 problem in plain English:

One car is doing 320 km/h. The next car suddenly drops power to charge its battery. The gap closes at 45 km/h. Nobody expects it.

That's "super clipping" — and it needs to go. #F1Fanrecap #F1 #Formula1

article.headline: Revealed: The Immediate Changes F1 Can Make to Fix the 2026 Power Unit Crisis

stories.title: Red Bull's Mekies "Confident" Verstappen Will Have a Faster Car From Miami

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Red Bull TP Laurent Mekies says he's "confident" Verstappen will have a faster car from Miami.

Japan's bodywork upgrade flopped. The 5-week break is Red Bull's last real chance to fix the RB22 before the season slips away.

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #RedBull

article.headline: Red Bull's Mekies 'Confident' Verstappen Will Have a Faster Car From Miami — But So He Was Before Japan

stories.title: Antonelli Reflects on Championship Lead: "Still Early Days to Think About It"

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Antonelli on leading the F1 championship at 19 years old: "Still early days to think about it."

72 points. Nine ahead of Russell. Youngest championship leader in history.

The kid is ice cold. ❄️ #F1Fanrecap #F1 #Antonelli

stories.title: Miami GP Preview — Sprint Weekend, Scorching Heat, 5-Week Wait

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
5 weeks until Miami. Here's what to know:

Sprint format weekend. 5.41km circuit. 3 DRS zones. Track temps around 38°C.

And a championship fight that's about to explode. 🏎️

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #MiamiGP

stories.title: Why Is There Such a Long F1 Break? Bahrain and Saudi Arabia Explained

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Why is F1 going quiet for 5 weeks?

Bahrain and Saudi Arabia were cancelled due to security concerns related to the conflict in Iran.

Miami (May 1-3) is now Round 4 — and the FIA is using the break to review the 2026 safety crisis.

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #Formula1
